---
lang: es
bibliography: references.bib
csl: ieee.csl
link-citations: false
nocite: |
  @*
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: book
    classoption:
      - openany
      - twoside
    papersize: a4
    fontsize: 12pt
    mainfont: "TeX Gyre Termes"
    geometry:
      - top=2cm
      - bottom=2cm
      - left=3cm
      - right=2.5cm
    toc: false
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    top-level-division: chapter
    colorlinks: true
    keep-tex: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \setcounter{secnumdepth}{3}
        \setcounter{tocdepth}{3}
        \setlength{\parskip}{7.2pt}
        \setlength{\parindent}{0cm}
        \usepackage{setspace}
        \usepackage{fancyhdr}
        \setlength{\headheight}{15pt}
        \pagestyle{fancy}
        \renewcommand{\chaptermark}[1]{\markboth{\thechapter \: \textsc{#1}}{}}
        \renewcommand{\sectionmark}[1]{\markboth{\thesection \: \textsc{#1}}{}}
        \fancyhf{}
        \fancyhead[L]{\leftmark}
        \fancyfoot[R]{\thepage}
        \fancypagestyle{plain}{%
          \fancyhead{}
          \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
        }
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
resource-path:
  - .
  - frontmatter_caratula
  - frontmatter_caratula/img
  - frontmatter_preliminares
  - frontmatter_preliminares/img
  - chapter01_intro
  - chapter01_intro/img
  - chapter02_marco_conceptual_y_tecnologico
  - chapter02_marco_conceptual_y_tecnologico/img
  - chapter03_estado_del_arte
  - chapter03_estado_del_arte/img
  - chapter04_necesidades_gis_y_usuarios_gis
  - chapter04_necesidades_gis_y_usuarios_gis/img
  - chapter05_premisas_arquitectura_y_diseno
  - chapter05_premisas_arquitectura_y_diseno/img
  - chapter06_software_legiongoes
  - chapter06_software_legiongoes/img
  - chapter07_aplicaciones_dentro_de_legiongoes
  - chapter07_aplicaciones_dentro_de_legiongoes/img
  - chapter08_evolucion
  - chapter08_evolucion/img
  - chapter09_limitaciones
  - chapter09_limitaciones/img
  - chapter10_proyeccion_futura
  - chapter10_proyeccion_futura/img
  - chapter11_conclusiones
  - chapter11_conclusiones/img
  - chapter12_bibliografia
---

{{< include frontmatter_caratula/caratula.qmd >}}

{{< include frontmatter_preliminares/01_dedicatoria.qmd >}}

{{< include frontmatter_preliminares/02_agradecimientos.qmd >}}

{{< include frontmatter_preliminares/03_resumen.qmd >}}

{{< include frontmatter_preliminares/04_abstract.qmd >}}

```{=latex}
\tableofcontents
\clearpage
```



{{< include chapter01_intro/chapter01_intro_body.qmd >}}

```{=latex}
\clearpage
```

{{< include chapter02_marco_conceptual_y_tecnologico/chapter02_marco_conceptual_y_tecnologico_body.qmd >}}

```{=latex}
\clearpage
```

{{< include chapter03_estado_del_arte/chapter03_estado_del_arte_body.qmd >}}

```{=latex}
\clearpage
```



{{< include chapter04_necesidades_gis_y_usuarios_gis/chapter04_necesidades_gis_y_usuarios_gis_body.qmd >}}

```{=latex}
\clearpage
```

{{< include chapter05_premisas_arquitectura_y_diseno/chapter05_premisas_arquitectura_y_diseno_body.qmd >}}

```{=latex}
\clearpage
```

{{< include chapter06_software_legiongoes/chapter06_software_legiongoes_body.qmd >}}

```{=latex}
\clearpage
```

{{< include chapter07_aplicaciones_dentro_de_legiongoes/chapter07_aplicaciones_dentro_de_legiongoes_body.qmd >}}

```{=latex}
\clearpage
```

{{< include chapter08_evolucion/chapter08_evolucion_body.qmd >}}

```{=latex}
\clearpage
```

{{< include chapter09_limitaciones/chapter09_limitaciones_body.qmd >}}

```{=latex}
\clearpage
```

{{< include chapter10_proyeccion_futura/chapter10_proyeccion_futura_body.qmd >}}

```{=latex}
\clearpage
```

{{< include chapter11_conclusiones/chapter11_conclusiones_body.qmd >}}

```{=latex}
\clearpage
```

{{< include chapter12_bibliografia/chapter12_bibliografia_body.qmd >}}
